summary: **Status:** implemented (data/molecules-v0, 54 records, all gates green) · **Date:** 2026-07-07 · **Spec anchor:** concept-hash-design.md §3.5 (normative molecule rules), §3.4 (WebResource example) · **Motivation:** M0b measured that **33.0% of TinyStories top-500 content mass is molecule-gated** — the single biggest coverage limiter in the programme (m0b-report.md: "the molecule tier is load-bearing for any corpus-level coverage claim, and it is currently unbuilt and unsized"). title: Design record — the molecule tier, v0
